name: Write modbus2mqtt config
description: Writes the modbus2mqtt YAML configuration into /config/modbus2mqtt/modbus2mqtt.yaml on the host-side volume directory before the LXC starts. Avoids the chicken-and-egg problem of the previous REST-upload pattern: modbus2mqtt opens its HTTPS admin endpoint only after a config file is present, so polling /api/health to upload via REST never succeeded. Using upload_pre_start_file places the file directly into the managed `config` volume's host filesystem path, so the service starts already configured.
